zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Baggott於1385年1月9日出生在英國德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓時，她的父親John Bagot32歲，母親Beatrice Mallory28歲。她和Sir, John Curzon至少有1個女兒。她去世於1451年1月10日在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Baggott于1385年1月9日出生在英国德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓时，她的父亲John Bagot32岁，母亲Beatrice Mallory28岁。她和Sir, John Curzon至少有1个女儿。她去世于1451年1月10日在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Baggott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Badgett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Baggott  .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Baggott was born on 9 January 1385, in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England, her father, John Bagot, was 32 and her mother, Beatrice Mallory, was 28. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir, John Curzon. She died on 10 January 1451, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Baggott est née le 9 janvier 1385, à Kedleston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bagot, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Mallory, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir, John Curzon. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Kedleston, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Baggott am 9. Januar 1385 in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bagot 32 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Mallory 28. Sie hatte mit Sir, John Curzon mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1451 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Baggott è nata il il 9 gennaio 1385 nel Kedleston, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, John Bagot, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Mallory, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir, John Curzon. Morì il 10 gennaio 1451, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Kedleston, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Baggottが1385年1月9日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアケドレストンで生まれた時，父John Bagotは32歳，母Beatrice Malloryは28歳であった。彼女はSir, John Curzonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1451年1月10日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアケドレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Baggott(이)가 1385년 1월 9일 영국 더비실르 케들레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bagot(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Mallory(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Sir, John Curzon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 1월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 케들레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.9 January 1385–10 January 1451: 9 de janeiro de 1385–10 de janeiro de 1451
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Baggott nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1385, em Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bagot, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Mallory, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir, John Curzon. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1451, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Baggott родилась 9 января 1385 г. в местности кедлестон, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bagot было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Mallory, 28. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir, John Curzon. Она умерла 10 января 1451 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности кедлестон, дирбишир, Англия.

es.9 January 1385–10 January 1451: 9 de enero de 1385–10 de enero de 1451
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Baggott nació el 9 de enero de 1385, en Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bagot, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrice Mallory, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir, John Curzon. Murió el 10 de enero de 1451, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
